――前線基地近くの森の中を、数台の馬車が歩いている。<br>１人の女性騎士が車内:
—Several carriages were traveling through the forest near the
Frontline Base. Inside one carriage, a female knight was writing a letter.
（……お父さま、お姉さま。とつぜんいなくなってごめんなさい。<br>わたしは今、:
(...Dear Father and Sister. I'm sorry for disappearing all of a sudden.
I'm on my way to the Frontline Base now.)
（うわさによると、前線基地では兵が足りなくて大変だそうです。<br>それを聞いて:
(I heard a rumor that the Frontline Base is short on soldiers and in
trouble. After hearing that, I couldn't stay silent.)
（そこで、こっそり前線基地へ向かう馬車に飛び込んだのです）: (So I snuck onto a carriage heading for the Frontline Base.)
（どうか心配しないでください。わたしの剣で、前線基地の、<br>正義のお役に立っ:
(Please don't worry. With my sword, I will serve the cause of justice
at the Frontline Base. I'll write again. Wait for me.)
そろそろ前線基地ですよー。用意してくださいねー。: We'll be at the Frontline Base soon. Please get ready.
し、司令官。とりあえず人は集めてみましたが……<br>明日の大穴探索、本当にこの:
C-Commander. We've gathered some people for now, but... are we
really going into the Abyss tomorrow with this force?
言いたいことは分かるが、仕方ないんだよ……手練れは家庭の事情等で留守。<br>昨:
I understand, but it can't be helped... The veterans are away and the
experienced soldiers from yesterday are exhausted. They need rest.
だが昨日、安全を確保したエリアの調査は進めておきたいんだ。<br>戦力に不安があ:
But I want to proceed with surveying the areas we secured yesterday.
Even if our force is lacking, we can't put off tomorrow's exploration.
とはいえ、厳しい探索になりそうですね……: Still, it looks like it's going to be a tough exploration...
この時期に苦労するのは分かっていたから、手は打っているんだけどな――<br>果た:
I knew it would be tough this time of year, so I've taken some
measures—but whether they'll arrive in time is another story...
司令官！ ミレスガルドから兵士が到着しました！<br>援軍とのことです！:
Commander! Soldiers have arrived from Milesgard! They're
reinforcements!
……！ 来てくれたか！<br>要請を出して正解だった！: ...! They came! Glad I put in that request!
あなたが司令官ですね？ お待たせして申し訳ございません！: You're the Commander, correct? Sorry to have kept you waiting!
これより、我々はあなたの指揮下に入ります！<br>よろしくお願いいたします！:
From now on, we are under your command! We look forward to
working with you!
こちらこそ、よろしく頼む。<br>さっそくだが、人員を各隊へ割り振りたい。:
Likewise, I look forward to it. But first, I'd like to assign personnel to
each unit.
口頭でいいから兵士たちについて聞かせてもらえると――ん？:
Just a verbal report is fine, so if you could give me some info on the
soldiers—huh?
……ここが、前線基地。<br>わたしの冒険が始まる場所……！:
...So this is the Frontline Base. The place where my adventure
begins...!
……ずいぶんと小さな娘がいるな？: ...We've sure got a young girl here, don't we?
あの娘も兵士なのか？<br>実は手練れとか……？: Is that girl also a soldier? Or maybe she's actually a veteran...
……はて。<br>あんな娘、連れてきた覚えはないんだが――: Hmm... I don't recall bringing a girl like that along...
（しれいかんがわたしのところへ……！<br>チャンスだわ！）: (The Commander is coming over to me! This is my chance!)
お前のことをミレスガルド兵たちは知らないようなんだが――<br>いったい何者だ？:
The Milesgard soldiers don't seem to know who you are... So who
exactly are you?
わたしはフレイヤです！ ミレスガルドの騎士です！<br>戦力が足りないと聞いて、:
I am Freya! A knight of Milesgard! I heard you were short on
manpower, so I came!
やってきた……というのは、無断でじゃないよな。<br>正規の入隊手続きは取ってい:
When you say 'came,' you didn't just sneak in, right? You went
through proper enlistment procedures?
でもでも、やる気だけは誰にも負けないんですっ！: But still, my motivation is second to none!
厄災と戦う前線基地は正義の剣であり盾！:
The Frontline Base that fights the Calamity is a sword and shield of
justice!
わたしも正義のために戦いたいんです！<br>そのためなら、何も怖くありませんっ！: I want to fight for justice too! For that, I'm not afraid of anything!
（やれやれ……厄介なやつが紛れていたな。<br>どうしたもんか……）: (Well, well... a troublesome one has slipped in. What should I do...)
要するに、子どもが正義に憧れて、勝手に紛れ込んできたってこと？: So basically, a kid got inspired by justice and snuck in on her own?
せっかく来てくれた援軍だが……あいつらみんな、大丈夫なのか？: These reinforcements came all this way, but... are they all right?
す、すみません、司令官……<br>隊の管理が行き届いていなかったようで……:
I-I'm sorry, Commander... It seems our squad's oversight was
inadequate...
いや、謝ることはない。まだ幼いが、俺たちを助けようとして<br>来てくれたのは間:
No, there's no need to apologize. She's still young, but it's clear she
came to help us. There's no reason to turn her away.
わぁ！ さすがはしれいかん！<br>わたしの気持ちを分かってくれましたか……やり:
Wow! Just as I'd expect from the Commander! You understand my
feelings... You're really good at this!♪
こ、こら！ 司令官になんて失礼な！: H-hey! That's rude to the Commander!
ハハッ！ いい。気にするな。: Haha! It's fine. Don't worry about it.
はい！ 何からやりますか？<br>大穴探索ですか？ モンスター退治ですかっ？:
Yes! What should I start with? Abyss exploration? Monster
extermination?
うんうん、頼もしいな。<br>だが、その一方で、問題もあるんだ。: Yeah, that's reassuring. But we've got a problem, too.
お前は正規の手順を踏んで入隊していないから、<br>俺たちはお前がどんなことをで:
You didn't go through the proper enlistment process, so we don't
know what you can do. What can you do, Freya?
剣が得意です！<br>幼い頃からずっと練習していますっ！: I'm skilled with a sword! I've been training since I was a child!
ほほう。なるほどなるほど、剣が扱えるのか！<br>ちょうどいい！ 頼みたい仕事が:
Ohh? So you can handle a sword! Perfect! I've got a job for you. Will
you come with me?
（わたしの初仕事ですね……行き先は大穴かな？<br>それともモンスターの巣？）:
(This is my first assignment... I wonder if it's the Abyss? Or maybe a
monster's nest?)
（どっちにしろ、絶対成功させます！<br>お父さまたちにさっそく手紙を書けそう…:
(Either way, I'll definitely succeed! I might be able to write to Father
and the others right away!♪)
……？ あの、しれいかん。<br>ここはキッチンですよね？ こんなところに、わた: ...? Um, Commander. This is the kitchen, right? Is my job here?
最近、厨房にネズミが出るようでな……<br>外のゴミ捨て場をカラスが荒らすことも:
Lately, rats have been appearing in the kitchen... And crows have
been raiding the garbage dump outside.
フレイヤには、そいつらの駆除を頼みたい！: Freya, I want you to get rid of them!
しれいかんっ！ がっかりですっ！<br>わたしは騎士ですよ！ それなのに害獣を倒:
Commander! I'm disappointed! I am a knight! Yet you want me to fight
vermin...
頼りにしている、というのはウソでしたか！？: Was that 'I'm counting on you' a lie?!
違う違う。本当に困っているんだ。<br>このままだと、みーんな腹を空かせることに:
No, no. I'm really in trouble. If we don't take care of this, everyone's
going to go hungry.
これも立派な正義のための仕事！<br>俺たちのために堪えてくれ！ 頼むっ！！: This is also a noble task for justice! Bear with it for our sake! Please!
お前だけが頼りなんだ！<br>分かってくれーっ！: You're my only hope! Please, understand!
な、なるほど～<br>そんなにわたしの力が必要なんですね……！: Oh, I see... So you really do need my strength...!
あ、あと、俺は司令官だから。お前や部隊を守るため、<br>お前の実力を見極めない:
Oh, and I'm the Commander. To protect you and the unit, I need to
gauge your abilities.
この仕事をちゃんとやってくれたら、兵士たちも説得しやすくなるだろう？:
If you do this job properly, it'll make it easier to convince the
soldiers, won't it?
ふっふっふ……分かりました！<br>騎士フレイヤ、しれいかんの期待に必ず応えます:
Fufufu... Understood! Knight Freya will surely meet the Commander's
expectations!
（思ってたのとはちがうけど――これも立派な仕事！<br>ここで力を示せばいいだけ:
(It's not what I expected, but this is still a worthy task! I just need to
prove my power here!)
（よしよし。その気になってくれたぞ。<br>うまくいけばネズミたちも駆除できる―:
(Good, good. She's on board. If this works, we'll get rid of the rats
too... Pretty perfect if I do say so myself. Fufu.)
ややっ！ さっそく出ましたね！？: Yikes! There it is already, huh!
そうらしい。お手並み拝見だ。<br>任せたぞ、フレイヤ！: So it seems. Let's see what you've got. I'm counting on you, Freya.
食べ物に手を付ける悪のネズミ！<br>そこになおりなさい！: Evil rat who steals food! You're under pest control—I mean, arrest!
わたしはフレイヤ！<br>世のため人のため、人々の剣と盾になる者！:
I am Freya! For the sake of the world and its people, I am she who
becomes their sword and shield!
きみを成敗して、わたしは大穴に――: I will punish you, and then I'm off to the Abyss—
……フレイヤ。<br>ネズミが大声に驚いて逃げてしまったぞ……: ...Freya. The rat got startled by your loud voice and ran away...
追い払ってくれたのはありがたいんだがな。<br>駆除しないと根本の解決にならん。:
I appreciate you chasing it away, but unless we get rid of it, it's not a
proper solution.
次こそはちゃんとやってみせますので！: I'll definitely do it right next time!
